content.en:
The materials of the Void Beast can improve the will, can also be used to refine the Void Saint Soldier, and can even fuse the will and the body, but he is still in the half-step Eternal Realm, so the fusion of the will and the body is still very far away.

And refining the Void Saint Soldier was not very helpful to him, so he only thought about using the materials of the Void Beast to improve his will.

Among the secrets revealed by the six presidents, there are naturally specific ways to refine and enhance the will, first need to refine the essence of the void from the materials of the Void Beast, and then integrate the will into the essence of nothingness, and the power in the essence of the void will be integrated into the will, which is equivalent to refining and improving the will.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian began to refine the Void Beast material, and drop after drop of Void Essence was refined by him.

Then the ontology used the essence of nothingness to refine and improve his will, and as time passed, his will became stronger and stronger, and the world of will was also perfected by him again and again, and the condensed world of will naturally became more and more.

Before he knew it, there were 9,000 condensed worlds of his will, and there were still many more essences of nothingness.

At this rate, he has the hope of condensing 10,000 worlds of will, thus transforming the eternal will to the third order.

919,100 World of Wills!

9200 worlds of wills!

9300 worlds of wills!

......

In the blink of an eye, several eternal years have passed, and after countless attempts, countless copies of the body have been shattered, and the secret technique of the Will World has been perfected step by step, and finally Ye Tian has successfully condensed to 9999 Will Worlds.

At this time, he only needs to condense a world of will, and the eternal will will transform, and his eternal will will reach the third order.

After many more attempts, the 10,000th Will World was finally opened up by Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!!

The 10,000 will worlds in the body are connected to each other, causing a huge qualitative change.

The will is transforming, improving, so that Ye Tian's will will carry out a huge leap transformation.

After a long time, the metamorphosis was complete.

Now, Ye Tian's will is more than ten times stronger than before, and his control of his body is far beyond before, which is enough to exert his strength far beyond before.

In the dark, Ye Tian had already touched the second boundary barrier.

But if he really fought, he would definitely be able to defeat Lord Gu He, because his will had reached the third order, and his will attack was enough to make Lord Gu He, like the Eight Extremes, unable to exert his full strength at all.

After touching the second boundary barrier, Ye's goal was to impact the Nine Extremes Realm. At present, his half-step eternal power can continue to be compressed, and if he creates the Transmission Eternal Technique, his strength will increase again, so there is a great possibility of breaking the second boundary barrier.

Now, he had already traded many Eternal Compression Secret Techniques from other Eight Extreme Realms, and after his innate comprehension and repeated experiments, he had already perfected the stacking secret technique to the limit that could be compressed to eighty times.

Of course, this is the theoretical limit, and it is not really achievable.

But Ye Tian still had a great hope of compressing the half-step eternal power to forty times, and with the legendary eternal technique, he didn't believe that he couldn't break the second boundary barrier.

In the years that followed, Ye Tian compressed the half-step eternal power while creating the legendary eternal technique.

The first Legendary Eternal Technique he wanted to create was naturally a Legendary Eternal Technique related to the Void Legendary Ancestral Fu, which was enough to enhance his life-saving ability.

Since there was only hope of breaking through to the Nine Extremes Realm in the Source Sea, Ye Tian only left one copy body in the Eight Extremes Building in the space-time territory, and the other copy bodies were in the dark forbidden realm of the Source Sea, helping the body to improve its strength together.

Eternal years after years passed, and Ye Tian's half-step eternal power was compressed more and more condensed.

Moreover, Ye Tian's legendary eternal technique was finally created on this day.

This time, the legendary eternal technique created by Ye Tian is called the Void True Body, once the Void True Body is activated, the body will be in a state of voiding, and it is more completely void than an ordinary Void Beast, as if it does not exist in the rules, and it completely turns into nothingness.

It can be said that once the Void True Body is cast, even the Eternal Realm Lord will not be able to hurt him in the slightest.

However, the Immortal Realm Lord was still able to hurt him, but it was a little difficult to kill him, unless the top Immortal Realm Lord intervened.

After creating the Void True Body, Ye Tian clearly felt the second boundary barrier tremble, but in the end, he still didn't break the second boundary barrier.

Obviously, he needs to continue to improve.

As a result, Ye Tian began to create legendary eternal techniques related to the Legendary Ancestral Endowment of Strength.

After ten eternal years, Ye Tian has finally created the second legendary eternal technique, the Eternal Extreme Dao Fist!

This is an eternal technique that exerts its power to the extreme, ranking among the legendary eternal techniques, which can completely burst out Ye Tian's power.

Compared to the Void True Body, the Eternal Extreme Dao Fist can greatly improve his strength.

When he created the Eternal Extreme Dao Fist, a crack appeared in the second boundary barrier, as if he could completely break this boundary barrier by increasing his strength by increasing some of his strength.

"It's really too difficult to break the second boundary barrier, I have all raised the eternal will to the third order, and I have also created two legendary eternal skills, and I still haven't broken the second boundary barrier, no wonder so many Eight Extremes Realm can't break the second boundary barrier. "

Ye Tian muttered.

There was no choice but to continue to create the Legendary Eternal Technique.

This time, 623 wants to create a defensive legendary eternal skill, and if he cooperates with the Void True Body, his life-saving ability will be stronger, and his combat power will naturally be stronger.

About ten years later, a defensive legendary eternal technique was created by Ye Tian, and he named it the Eternal Wall!

The Eternal Wall is equivalent to forming an invisible defensive barrier around it, invisible to the naked eye, but its defensive power is extremely terrifying, not only can it protect against ordinary attacks, but even will attacks can be defended.

After the creation of the legendary eternal technique of the Eternal Wall, there were more and more cracks in the second boundary barrier.

"Let's not create a legendary eternal technique first, first compress the half-step eternal power to 40 times, and then create a speed-type legendary eternal technique, there is definitely hope to break the shackles in one fell swoop and be promoted to the nine-step Eternal Realm half-step Eternal Realm realm!"

Ye Tian planned.

In this way, in the next eternal years, he is trying to compress his half-step eternal power, so that the half-step eternal power is getting closer and closer to the real eternal power.

Ten eternal years!

Twenty eternal years!

Thirty eternal years!

Before you know it, a hundred eternal years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's half-step eternal power was finally compressed to 40 times, and the second boundary barrier was almost completely shattered. _
